title: rosa × subcollina
intro: Rosa × subcollina, also known as the Rosa × odorata 'Korolk' or the Rosa × odorata 'Korolkii', is a type of hybrid rose plant that is a cross between Rosa gallica and Rosa moschata. This plant has been found to have various medicinal properties, including its use as an anti-inflammatory and antiseptic agent. The health benefits of Rosa × subcollina include its ability to reduce stress and promote relaxation, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing and skin care. Rosa × subcollina can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
